3309690.name: OMSI 2 Add-on City & Regionbus 200 Series
3309690.description:
Add-On "City & Regionbus 200-Series" for OMSI 2! This add-on includes the legendary buses produced by the world-famous German bus manufacturer, produced from 1976 to 1994, designed for optimal operation both on city routes and in the suburbs.

  • Customization: The add-on presents the S-200 series of various configurations, each of which differs in size, appearance, and technical characteristics, which will allow you to choose the optimal bus for any route. In addition, you can customize the parameters of the bus parts yourself to find the best balance between your preferences and factory configurations.

  • Realistic sounds: Enjoy immersion in the atmosphere of the bus with well-developed sound effects. Each element - from the engine to the noise in the cabin - adds verisimilitude to your game.

  • Different types of control: Master different driving styles with automatic and manual transmissions. With the option of automatic clutch, you can focus on the route and passengers, not on changing gears.

  • Ideal for any route: "City&RegionBus 200-Series" perfectly copes with the challenges of both the urban environment and the quieter suburban area, as well as a special modification for suburban and intercity transport, offering you maximum flexibility and ease of operation.

Feel like a real bus driver with the add-on "City & Regionbus 200-Series" and discover interesting routes with the help of classic German buses that have forever left their mark on the history of passenger transport. Take advantage of all the advantages of this unique add-on and create unforgettable trips in the world of OMSI 2
